objective: Demonstrate a rolling Campfire task that can auto-advance across multiple milestones in the Codex App.

current.slice_title: Implement the second milestone while the run budget remains
acceptance_criteria: The rolling execution policy is visible in task state
The task can keep going without stopping after one validated milestone

queued_milestones.milestone_title: Wrap the rolling run with documentation and final evaluation

execution.notes: This example starts after one validated milestone to show auto-advance and bounded queue replenishment when the queue gets short.

last_run.summary: The example task validated its first milestone, auto-advanced into the second one, and then paused with the remaining queue preserved.
last_run.next_step: Implement milestone-002 while the rolling run budget remains.

validation.summary: The rolling queue note explains the auto-advance example.
